gold.title: Delete Button
gold.reason: Animated countdown with per-letter staggered animations, lock icon morph, and spring-physics delete confirmation. Multi-state UX that is visually dramatic and memorable.

gold.title: Save Button
gold.reason: Shimmer sweep gradient on idle, confetti burst on success state. 514 downloads validates high demand. Self-contained with no external CSS dependencies.

gold.title: Interactive Hover Button
gold.reason: Expanding dot fills the button on hover, arrow icon appears, full loading and success state transitions. Complete interactive lifecycle with polished spring physics.

gold.title: Shiny Button
gold.reason: Blue gradient with heavy radial glow halo, animated background-position shimmer. Immediately eye-catching as a hero CTA with no external dependencies.

gold.title: Liquid Glass Button
gold.reason: SVG feTurbulence + feDisplacementMap creates genuine liquid distortion on hover. Also includes a MetalButton with realistic brushed metal layering. Technically unique.

gold.title: BG Animated Button
gold.reason: Spinning conic gradient border with multiple theme variants (purple, orange, teal). Continuous rotation creates unmistakable wow factor for any landing page CTA.

gold.title: Texture Button
gold.reason: Layered gradient texture with depth shadow and inset highlight. 132 downloads. Sophisticated dark-mode premium aesthetic.

gold.title: Liquid Glass Button
gold.reason: 2398 downloads validates it as the most-used glass button. Backdrop-blur morphism with animated border glow.

gold.title: Shiny Button
gold.reason: CSS @property animates a conic gradient border in a continuous sweep. The rotating gradient border is visually striking and unique in the registry.

gold.title: Rainbow Button
gold.reason: 14,267 downloads and 108 likes — the most popular animated button in the registry. Continuously animated rainbow gradient background with blurred glow underlay.

gold.title: HUD Button
gold.reason: Sci-fi HUD SVG clip-path shape with animated scanning dot trail and corner brackets. Unique futuristic aesthetic with no dependencies.

gold.title: Button
gold.reason: Four distinct premium variants: shine sweep, gooey morph, ring hover, link hover. 176 downloads. Covers multiple use-cases at Gold quality in a single component.

gold.title: Joly Button
gold.reason: 10+ design variants (glass, neon, gradient, outline) with cursor-tracking radial highlight. One of the most versatile Gold components in the registry.

gold.title: Liquid Metal Button
gold.reason: Uses @paper-design/shaders WebGL shader for authentic flowing liquid metal effect. Technically the most advanced render technique in the entire registry.

gold.title: Gradient Button
gold.reason: Three.js + GSAP WebGL post-processing bloom effect. Animated gradient mesh rendered in real-time. Highest visual fidelity button in the registry.

gold.title: Rainbow Button
gold.reason: Animated rainbow gradient with blurred colored glow below. Clean implementation of the rainbow pattern from a trusted registry author.

gold.title: Shimmer Button
gold.reason: Spinning conic shimmer animation using CSS container-query units on dark background. The animating light sweep creates premium SaaS CTA feel.

gold.title: Fishy Button
gold.reason: Fish SVG swims through the button interior on hover using CSS offset-path animation. Delightfully unique and memorable with zero dependencies.

gold.title: Modern Retro Button
gold.reason: GSAP sweeping color bars + text flicker effect on hover. Retro-cinema aesthetic with high production value. Stands out strongly on dark backgrounds.

gold.title: Animated Generate Button
gold.reason: Per-letter flicker scramble + rotating multi-layer gradient glow border. Complex multi-layer effect that creates premium AI/generative UI feel.

gold.title: Shiny Button
gold.reason: SVG feColorMatrix combined with multi-layer rotating conic gradient glow. Technically inventive approach producing a distinctive metallic halo.

gold.title: Skeuomorphism in the Dark Button
gold.reason: Multi-layer skeuomorphic 3D button with realistic inset shadows, dark metal gradient, and surface highlight. Best skeuomorphic implementation in the registry.

gold.title: Slide Button
gold.reason: Spring-physics drag-to-send with loading and success states. 304 downloads. The swipe gesture mechanic adds unique interaction value for confirmation CTAs.

gold.title: Gradient Button
gold.reason: 6,277 downloads and 59 likes — the second most popular button in the registry. Clean rotating gradient with proven market demand.

gold.title: 3D Button
gold.reason: SVG splash rays animate outward, SVG path outline draws itself, staggered letter animations with blur-in. One of the most layered animated effects in the registry.

gold.title: Button 1
gold.reason: 7 overlapping radial gradients with mix-blend-mode and animated scale/opacity create a uniquely organic liquid glow effect. Technically among the most sophisticated.

gold.title: Wet Paint Button
gold.reason: Animated paint drip SVG effect below the button on hover. Highly unique visual concept with strong visual identity for creative/art-focused sites.

gold.title: Button
gold.reason: tsparticles stars fly out from the button on hover over a blue-purple gradient. Particle burst CTA is visually spectacular and universally applicable.

gold.title: Material Design 3 Button
gold.reason: Full MD3 physics ripple engine with 5 official variants (filled, tonal, outlined, elevated, text). The most complete button system in the registry.
